summary: Tested meditation/TTS bug fix (missing os and hashlib imports). All backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend meditation page fully functional with all 3 modes (Guided, Build Your Own, Timer). AI meditation generation and TTS narration working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meditation and TTS bug fix verified. The missing imports (os.getenv replaced with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY from deps, hashlib added to knowledge.py) are working correctly. All meditation endpoints functional: POST /api/meditation/generate-guided (AI generation), POST /api/meditation/save-custom, GET /api/meditation/my-custom, DELETE /api/meditation/custom/{id}. TTS endpoint POST /api/tts/narrate working with caching (hashlib). Frontend meditation page at /meditation has 3 modes: Guided Meditations (6 preset meditations with full-screen session overlay), Build Your Own (4-step wizard with AI generation), Timer Mode (duration presets + ambient sounds).

bug_fix_verification.issue: Guided meditation mode not working - NameError for os and hashlib
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: meditations.py used os.getenv('EMERGENT_LLM_KEY') but os was not imported. knowledge.py used hashlib for TTS caching but hashlib was not imported.
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Replaced os.getenv('EMERGENT_LLM_KEY') with already-imported EMERGENT_LLM_KEY constant from deps. Added 'import hashlib' to knowledge.py line 13.

POST /api/meditation/generate-guided.description: AI generates personalized meditation steps based on intention, duration, and focus. Returns array of steps with time, text, and duration fields.

POST /api/meditation/save-custom.description: Saves custom meditation with name, intention, focus, duration, sound, color, and steps. Returns saved document with generated id.

GET /api/meditation/my-custom.description: Returns user's saved custom meditations sorted by created_at descending.

DELETE /api/meditation/custom/{id}.description: Deletes custom meditation by id. Returns 404 if not found.

POST /api/tts/narrate.description: Text-to-speech returns base64 audio. Supports voice selection (nova, shimmer, sage, etc.) and speed (0.8-1.15). Caching with hashlib working correctly.

Meditation page /meditation.description: Loads with 3 mode tabs: Guided Meditations, Build Your Own, Timer Mode. All tabs functional.

Guided session overlay.description: Full-screen overlay with progress ring, step text, timer, pause/end buttons, and Voice Guide (TTS) button.

Build Your Own wizard.description: 4-step wizard: Step 1 (intention + focus), Step 2 (name, duration, sound, color), Step 3 (generating), Step 4 (review + edit steps). AI generation takes 10-20 seconds.

Timer Mode.description: Duration presets (5-60 min), ambient sounds (silence, rain, ocean, forest, bowls, wind), play/pause controls, Guided Voice button.

Voice Guide (NarrationPlayer).description: Voice settings dropdown with 9 voice options and 3 speed options. TTS generates and plays audio.

api_verification.POST /api/tts/narrate: 200 OK - Returns base64 audio, rejects short/empty text with 400
api_verification.POST /api/meditation/generate-guided: 200 OK - AI generates meditation steps (requires auth)
api_verification.GET /api/meditation/my-custom: 200 OK - Returns user's custom meditations (requires auth)
